{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Winter’s Blade sect
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Winter’s Blade sect]] was once pitted against the [[Seishen Kingdom]] by [[Akura Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
